name: Irish Potato Stew
recipeIngredient: 5 medium potatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped (about 5-6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and cut them into large, coarse pieces.
2. Make a roux by cooking equal parts flour and butter or oil until golden brown.
3. In a separate pan, sauté one finely diced onion in the roux until softened.
4. Add chopped bacon (if desired) to the onions and cook until crispy.
5. Place the potato pieces into the pan with the bacon and onions. Allow them to simmer together for about 5 minutes.
6. Pour boiling water over the potatoes, adding salt and pepper to taste. Stir to combine.
7. Simmer until the potatoes are tender and fully cooked through.
